scripts.build: npm run build:bank && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "CLIENT,SERVER,DEVVIT" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:devvit"
scripts.install:all: devvit install logic_thread_dail_dev && devvit install LogicThreadGame
scripts.deploy: npm run build && devvit upload && npm run install:all
scripts.launch: npm run build && devvit upload && devvit publish && npm run install:all
